limitations: Does not contain patient-identifying data, real case data, raw records, molecular reports, pathology reports, flow reports, images, notes, exact dates tied to a person, private paths, private case IDs, private correspondence, or re-identification keys.
Does not collect, normalize, store, transmit, train on, infer from, publish, compare, rank, match, recommend, or authorize use of real case data.

Does not output patient-specific progression risk, response probability, MRD interpretation, resistance attribution, treatment recommendations, trial recommendations, monitoring actions, candidate option rankings, or clinical decisions.
Does not claim that expert review, clinical review, endorsement, consensus, publication readiness, model validity, clinical utility, deployment readiness, or clinical validity has been achieved.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured or that a vaccine has been found.
